description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: capital of the State of Michoacán, Mexico
description_wiki: Morelia (Spanish pronunciation: [moˈɾelja]; from 1545 to 1828 known as Valladolid; Otomi: Mänxuni) is the capital and most populous city of the Mexican state of Michoacán.

description: air service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Air Force (USAF) is the air service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

1951 (MCMLI) was a common year starting on Monday of the Gregorian calendar, the 1951st year of the Common Era (CE) and Anno Domini (AD) designations, the 951st  year of the 2nd millennium, the 51st  year of the 20th century, and the  2nd   year of the 1950s decade.

description: international service organization based in the United States
description_wiki: Lions Clubs International is an international service organization, currently headquartered in Oak Brook, Illinois.

description: city and county seat of Cook County, and largest city in State of Illinois, United States of America
description_wiki: Chicago is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Illinois and in the Midwestern United States.

description: city in and county seat of Pima County, Arizona, United States
description_wiki: Tucson (; O'odham: Cuk Ṣon; Spanish: Tucsón) is the county seat of and the most populated city in Pima County, Arizona, United States.

description: city in and county seat of Santa Cruz County, Arizona, United States, on the Mexican border
description_wiki: Nogales (Spanish pronunciation: [noˈɣales] ; English:  or ) is a city in and the county seat of Santa Cruz County, Arizona, United States.
McDonald's Corporation, doing business as McDonald's, is an American multinational fast food restaurant chain.

description: clown mascot of McDonald's restaurant chain
description_wiki: Ronald McDonald is a clown character used as the primary mascot of the McDonald's fast-food restaurant chain.

description: U.S. discount retailer based in Arkansas

description_wiki: Lisa Frank (born 21 April 1955) is an American artist and businesswoman, the founder of Lisa Frank Incorporated, headquartered in Tucson, Arizona.
